title: Delicate Dutch Pistachio Puff
description: A buttery and pillowy Dutch dish featuring ground pistachios, perfect for a keto-friendly snack or dessert
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and line a baking sheet with parchment paper
In a medium bowl, whisk together the almond flour, granulated sweetener, and salt
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, cream cheese, and vanilla extract
Add the ground pistachios to the wet ingredients and stir until well combined
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until a dough forms
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/4 inch
Fold the dough in half lengthwise, like a letter, and then fold it in half again
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch again and cut into desired shapes
Place the shapes on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes
Remove the puffs from the oven and allow them to cool on a wire rack
